text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 77 

SPIINJ_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Spinal Cord Injury First Ever Occurrence Date — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the spinal cord injury 
indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had the condition. 

SHORT NAME: SPIINJ_MEDICARE_EVER
